settings.heading: bio
settings.text: Kid Finesse is a genre-bending artist redefining what it means to be clean, compelling, and emotionally real. A timeless voice from Idaho Falls, he merges melodic rap, pop, and R&B into hook-driven songs that are as polished as they are personal. Known for his refusal to swear and his ability to write songs that hit both charts and hearts, he’s quietly building a catalog that stands the test of time.Kid Finesse has said "I'm not hear to compete with the industry, I'm here to change the industry completely. I'm here to represent the unrepresented, those who feel deeply, those who have a dream, and those who simply like to catch a vibe wherever they go.

settings.heading: Mission
settings.text: Kid Finesse began his music journey in Idaho Falls, Idaho, in the summer of 2017 after his best friend and musical inspiration took his life. His mission since has been to honor the life of his friend, and speak to hearts of anyone feeling anything but limitless. From rapping to trapping to LDS missionary to worldwide artist, Kid Finesse has proven he is here for the long haul. Follow Kid Finesse in the journey of authenticity expression, raw unfiltered emotion and the purpose of uniting the world.
